files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
summary: Added strip_metadata kw-only param (bool, default False) to exif_transpose + overloads; body clears exif/info when set. Please add your transform_callback param after mine to minimize signature conflicts; I will write my own patch.txt from git diff so overlapping edits in shared working tree are expected.
